messages.content: Give all subject, relation, and object triplets from the sentence, 'A man is leaping and holding a frisbee over his head, in a park-like area, that shows a perimeter of tall trees, and in the back area a tennis court, as well as an area under repair.'.

1. Subject: A man
   Relation: is leaping and holding
   Object: a frisbee

2. Subject: A man
   Relation: is leaping and holding
   Object: a frisbee over his head

3. Subject: A man
   Relation: is leaping
   Object: in a park-like area

4. Subject: A man
   Relation: is leaping and holding
   Object: a frisbee over his head, in a park-like area

5. Subject: A park-like area
   Relation: shows
   Object: a perimeter of tall trees

6. Subject: A park-like area
   Relation: shows
   Object: a perimeter of tall trees, in the back area a tennis court

7. Subject: A park-like area
   Relation: shows
   Object: a perimeter of tall trees, in the back area a tennis court, as well as an area under repair
